channel.title: Claude-Code on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Claude-Code on Junho Lee

item.title: What Actually Improves Claude Code Performance: Configuration and Architecture
item.description: Keeping Claude Code in a minimal state, optimizing reasoning settings to reduce hallucinations, and building an architecture-first development environment — a practical take on what actually moves the needle.

item.title: Cutting Through Claude Code Setup Confusion with Plugin Advisor
item.description: If you have ever stalled in front of the plugin list when first setting up Claude Code, Plugin Advisor narrows that entrance. Preset Packs and pre-flight checklists catch runtime errors before they happen.
